ac1_allNonZeroMaxTokens.detail: All 11 models (10 from models.json via patch, 1 from custom-models.json) have maxTokens > 0

ac3_deepseek32768.detail: DeepSeek V4 Flash and Pro both resolve to maxTokens: 32768

ac5_visionConfig.detail: 3 multimodal models (Kimi K2.6, K2.7, MiniMax M3) resolve to vision.maxImagesPerRequest: 5

ac7_applyPatchVision.detail: Both index.ts and scripts/update-models.js applyPatch handle vision metadata

ac8_readmeDocs.detail: README model table includes maxTokens and vision notes; patch metadata fields section added

ac9_noRegression.detail: All existing reasoning, thinkingLevelMap, compat, notes, and input entries preserved; only additions

ac10_jsonValidation.detail: patch.json is valid JSON; merged model validation passes for all 11 models
